title: YHAC-B Model Nomenclature
summary: Model number breakdown: Y=York, H=Heat Pump, AC=Air Cooled, 40=Capacity kW, C=Cooling Only (H=Heat Pump), E=220V/50Hz (E=380V/3N/50Hz), 0=Standard, 1=High Efficiency, 0=R22 (N=R407C), 0=Standard, B=Revision.

title: YHAC-B Operating Limits
summary: Outdoor temperature limits: cooling 21~45°C DB, heating -15~15°C DB. Leaving water temperature: cooling 5~12°C, heating 25~45°C. Max water pressure 1.0 MPa.

title: Water Quality Requirements
summary: Water quality standards: pH 7.5-8.0, total hardness 4.8-8.5 dH, oxygen content <0.1 ppm, free chlorine <0.5 ppm, etc.
evidence_quote:
PH 25                                          7.5-8.0                                                              7.5-8.0
Total hardness                  dH Total hardness                  dH 4.8-8.5                                               Oxygen content                  ppm  Oxygen content                  ppm <0.1

title: Water System Cleaning and Passivation
summary: After installation, clean the water system with trisodium phosphate or sodium carbonate, then passivate with sodium nitrite or similar inhibitor.

title: Minimum Clearance for YHAC-B Units
summary: Maintain at least 20 cm clearance around the unit for proper airflow and service access.

title: E2ROM Fault
summary: E2ROM fault indicates a memory error in the controller.

title: Communicating Fault
summary: Communicating fault indicates a communication error between controller and other devices.

title: Temperature Setting Range
summary: Temperature setting range is 5~18°C for cooling and 35~45°C for heating, with default 12°C cooling and 40°C heating.

title: Analog Input Defaults
summary: Analog input defaults: A1=15, A2=32, A3=40, A4=8, A5=15, A6=16.

title: ON/OFF Control Logic
summary: Pressing ON/OFF toggles unit operation; LED indicates status.
